statusLine.command: jq -r '"[\(.model.display_name)] ctx: \(.context_window.remaining_percentage // 100 | floor)% left | 5h: \(100 - (.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // 0) | floor)% left | 7d: \(100 - (.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // 0) | floor)% left | $\(.cost.total_cost_usd // 0 | tostring | .[0:5])"'
